title: add unit tests for make_transport address parsing
description: make_transport is the only public-facing parsing function with no tests. Regressions (e.g., stripping the bracket fix above) will not be caught until integration testing. Missing cases: valid TCP '127.0.0.1:8080', valid UDS '/run/wolfhsm.sock', invalid 'localhostonly' (no colon), invalid 'host:notaport' (port not u16). All are unit-testable with no network.
